```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement deployment notification system"
---
# Deployment Notifications
## Task
Implement deployment notification system.
## Requirements
1. Notify on deployment start, success, and failure. 2. Include version, environment, and deployer.
3. Send to Slack/Teams/email channels. 4. Include rollback instructions on failure.
5. Track deployment frequency metrics.
## Constraints
- Notify relevant team only. Include actionable info. Track deployment metrics.
## Success Criteria
- Team notified on all deployments. Failure notifications include rollback. Metrics tracked.
```
